description: FOURTH PvP anchor (2026-04-20 03:56:33, X:86 Y:197). [SUP]Amanda (attacker, solo) DECISIVE VICTORY over [CoC]RampageR garrison + [CoC]Dolan garrison support. All-T11 fight (no T12 troops). Attacker won with 152,854 survivors of 261,972 (58.3%), defenders FULLY WIPED. Key features: defender is 69% MARKSMAN behind a tiny 41k wall; defender panels are LETH/HEALTH-stacked (+15% widgets on Def/Leth/Health) yet LOST decisively - the sharpest exponent/stat-weighting anchor. Report also gives PER-SKILL KILL numbers on BOTH sides (the first clean skill-packet magnitude oracle). Input scenario = Scenarios/Calibration_Amanda_Ramp.json (1000 runs seed 4471).
specials_note: Both sides: +20% troops A/D/L/H items, -20% enemy A/D items, pets +10% A/D/L/H, enemy pet penalties. Defender widgets: Defender Troops' Defense +15%, Lethality +15%, Health +15% (attacker none - solo). All baked into panel_pct.
skill_kill_oracle: PER-SKILL KILLS from the report (both sides - the first clean skill-packet magnitude anchor): attacker Gisela 0 kills (buff rows only, triggers 1/9/8/23); Karol one row 6 triggers 3,267 kills; att Ligeia 8 triggers 6,965 kills (SK2-class) + 4 triggers 3,121 kills. Defender Hervor 0 kills (1/1/1/13); Flora 3 triggers 637 kills (rows x15/x1/x4/x4); def Ligeia 8 triggers 4,723 kills + 7 triggers 3,850 kills. TOTAL skill-attributed kills ~22.6k of 312k casualties = ~7%. ENGINE AT DIAGNOSIS TIME: def Ligeia SK2+SK3 = 99k kills (12x real) - skill packets over-scaled.
clock_note: Both Ligeias' every-2 skill triggered 8x -> ~15-17 turns; Flora row x15; Hervor x13; att Gisela x23 (cadence unclear - OPEN, do not force). Turns gate set [14,18].
structural_ground_truth: Same wall physics as anchor 3, now vs a marksman-heavy garrison: (1) attacker LANCERS again ZERO casualties (26,197 intact) - her wall held the whole battle (inf 157k->59k survivors). (2) Her MARKSMAN lost only 14% (bypass procs only - enemy lancers just 20k). (3) The defender's tiny 62k wall fell early, exposing 141k marksman which were then wiped - marksman-heavy comps collapse once the wall breaks. (4) DEFENDER PANELS LETH/HEALTH-STACKED (+36% leth, +36% health vs attacker) YET LOST DECISIVELY with a 1.29x count disadvantage - leth/health contribute far less than the engine's beast-fitted exponents (L linear, H^1.45) predict. This is the sharpest anchor for the damage-formula stat weighting.
prediction_failure_2026_07_08: Turn engine (freshly recalibrated on anchors 1-3) INVERTS this battle: p_win=0.000, attacker wiped turn ~9-10, defender keeps ~66%. Reality: attacker wins 58.3% survivors, defender wiped, ~16 turns. Diagnosis: (a) defender out-damages attacker ~4:1 in-engine - their stacked LETH (x1.36, enters linearly) and HEALTH (x1.36 at ^1.45 exponent) dominate; reality shows those stats matter far less. (b) Skill packets over-scaled ~12x (def Ligeia 99k engine kills vs 8.6k real) - fixed by calibrating K_skill against this report's per-skill kill numbers. Anchor 4 gates: winner A, turns [14,18], att survivors [45%,70%], def wiped, att lancer loss <5%, att marks loss [5%,30%], att inf survivors [25%,55%], skill-kill share <20% both sides.
